zh.lifeSummary: 當Lora FitzHugh於大約1424年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾拉文斯沃斯時，她的父親William FitzHugh27歲，母親Lady Margaret Willoughby31歲。她於1449年3月7日與Sir John Constable IV在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1469年5月10日之前在英國英格蘭越可爾哈爾善姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lora FitzHugh于大约1424年出生在英国英格兰越可爾拉文斯沃斯时，她的父亲William FitzHugh27岁，母亲Lady Margaret Willoughby31岁。她于1449年3月7日与Sir John Constable IV在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1469年5月10日之前在英国英格兰越可爾哈爾善姆。

nameMeanings.name: FitzHugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Northamptonshire): from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Hugh (see Hugh ), ‘son of Hugh’.

History: William Fitzhugh (1651–1701), from Bedford, England, emigrated to VA c. 1670 and established himself on the Potomac River in what was then Stafford County, VA, as a planter and exporter. He also practiced law, was a member of the Virginia House of Burgesses, and served in 1687 as lieutenant colonel of the county militia.

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Lora
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably a respelling of   Laura  , that coincides in form with the German spelling of the same name and also with the medieval English given name.

en.lifeSummary: When Lora FitzHugh was born about 1424, in Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, William FitzHugh, was 27 and her mother, Lady Margaret Willoughby, was 31. She married Sir John Constable IV on 7 March 1449, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. She died before 10 May 1469, in Halsham, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lora FitzHugh est née environ 1424, à Ravensworth, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William FitzHugh, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret Willoughby, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Constable IV le 7 mars 1449, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée avant 10 mai 1469, à Halsham, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lora FitzHugh um 1424 in Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William FitzHugh 27 und ihre Mutter Lady Margaret Willoughby 31. Sie hat am 7. März 1449 in Yorkshire, England Sir John Constable IV geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb vor 10. Mai 1469 in Halsham, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lora FitzHugh è nata il circa 1424 nel Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William FitzHugh, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Lady Margaret Willoughby, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Constable IV il 7 marzo 1449, nel Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie. Morì prima del 10 maggio 1469, nel Halsham, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lora FitzHughが約1424年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアラベンスウオルスで生まれた時，父William FitzHughは27歳，母Lady Margaret Willoughbyは31歳であった。1449年3月7日にイギリスヨークシュアイアでSir John Constable IVと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1469年5月10日以前にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアハルシャムで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lora FitzHugh(이)가 대략 1424년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 레이븐스워스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William FitzHugh(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Margaret Willoughby(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1449년 3월 7일 영국 요르크실르에서 Sir John Constable IV(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1469년 5월 10일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 할샤에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lora FitzHugh nasceu aproximadamente 1424, em Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William FitzHugh, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margaret Willoughby, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Constable IV em 7 de março de 1449, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu antes 10 de maio de 1469, em Halsham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lora FitzHugh родилась около 1424 г. в местности равенсворт, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William FitzHugh было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Willoughby, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Constable IV 7 марта 1449 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла перед 10 май 1469 г. в местности холшам, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lora FitzHugh nació aproximadamente 1424, en Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William FitzHugh, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Lady Margaret Willoughby, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Sir John Constable IV el 7 de marzo de 1449, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió antes de 10 de mayo de 1469, en Halsham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
